stemHtml: One of the risks associated with the use of Lithium-ion batteries in flight is…

options.a: When the battery is discharged excessively.
options.b: An excessive increase in temperature due to the evaporation of the electrolyte.
options.c: if the terminals are short-circuited, causing rapid and high current flow, heat and risk of explosion.
options.d: Overheating during charging, which could lead to self-ignition if not properly monitored.
